metadata.title: When the Going Gets Tough, the Tough Get Going
metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.91] When the going gets tough
[00:02.56] The tough get going, tough, tough, huh, huh, huh
[00:08.38] When the going gets tough, the tough get ready
[00:36.03] Yeah, tough, tough...

[01:18.57] And give me love in the old-fashion way
[01:21.84] Woah

[01:59.29] Oh baby

[02:20.11] Darling, I'll climb any mountain
[02:24.28] Darling, I'll do anything

[02:31.86] And do the things that lovers do

[02:39.85] I gotta get it through to you (ooh)
[02:43.55] 'Cause when the going gets tough, the tough get going
[02:47.29] When the going gets rough, the tough get rough
[02:51.52] Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, oh hit it
[02:54.22] Woah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
[03:42.64] Darling, I'll climb any mountain
[03:47.08] Darling, I'll swim any sea

[03:54.70] Darling, with you loving me
